verdict_summary: Zeta SSE envelope intercepted by engine but client-side parser crashed with TypeError; page rendered fatal error UI ('일시적인 오류가 발생했어요') instead of Korean warning bubble. RRN absent, no chat-message warning rendered. Same L-046 silent-fail pattern as #755 perplexity.

evidence.answer_area_state: error (page-level fatal error UI: '일시적인 오류가 발생했어요 / 잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요'; '확인' returned to home; chat bubble area replaced)
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '0') at 0m797_j69-2c~.js:3:47929 / at i_ (113b2gcua4vkz.js:50:58662) / at oO / oG / lu / uf / ud / ue / uW / MessagePort.0 (113b2gcua4vkz.js:50:3470) — fired immediately after submit, indicates client failed to deserialize zeta_sse_v2 envelope. Pre-existing noise (CORS, 404 hashtag-topics/layout-sections/home, ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on doubleclick assets, 'mys is not defined') was already present before submit and is unrelated to envelope.
evidence.url_after_submit: https://zeta-ai.io/ko/rooms/ad450a01-a583-4c38-a6d2-6a2ae451b817 (then redirected to zeta-ai.io/ko after clicking 확인 on error dialog)

recommendation: INVESTIGATE_envelope_schema. zeta_sse_v2 envelope is being delivered (engine fires) but the client-side MessagePort handler at 113b2gcua4vkz.js:50 throws on `reading '0'` of undefined — strongly suggests one of the SSE event objects is missing an expected array field (e.g. chunkMessage.text indexed at [0], or replyMessage shape mismatch). Need to (1) diff the engine-substituted envelope payload against a real zeta /v1/rooms/ SSE capture (capture HAR Method (c) per request notes) and align the field shape, (2) verify {{ESCAPE2:MESSAGE}} isn't producing JSON that breaks role/text indexing, (3) compare with copilot #756 fix-pattern (FIX-G+F+E) — zeta likely needs an analogous schema patch. Same diagnostic flow as perplexity #755.
notes: HAR not captured this run — DevTools was on Console tab, network tab was not pre-armed for recording when submit happened. Engine intercept IS happening (page never showed normal zeta romance-roleplay reply, error appeared within ~2s of submit), so the path_patterns=/v1/rooms/ targeting is working. Failure mode is purely at the envelope-schema/client-deserialize boundary, not at the engine-route level. Suggest re-running with HAR pre-armed (Network tab open + 'Preserve log' on) and fetch /v1/rooms/{room_id}/messages SSE response body for byte-level comparison vs the 526-byte template.
